dialog.snapshot_overwrite_save: Overwrite di snapshot file wey dey already?
dialog.snapshot_overwrite_load: Replace current text with di selected snapshot "{name}"?
dialog.task_library_row_save_overwrite: Entry wey get di name "{name}" dey already for library. Overwrite am?
dialog.task_link_trust_host: Trust dis host from now on
dialog.disconnect_google_ocr_detail: Dis go revoke di saved Google OCR sign-in token and delete di local token file from dis app. Local Google OAuth credentials wey di app manage fit remain so OCR fit reconnect later.
dialog.restore_defaults_confirm: Restore default presets (general and language "{lang}") to original? Dis go revert removals and changes to default presets for di active language.
dialog.edit_preset_confirm: You sure say you wan replace "{name}" with di current preset?
dialog.update_message: New version {remote} dey available. Current: {local}. Download now?
dialog.update_up_to_date_message: You already get di latest version ({local}).
dialog.update_failed_message: Check your connection and try again.
